title: Evangelion solar powered watches announced
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion solar powered watches announced             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sun Dec 15, 2024 12:41 pm https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/intere ... es/.218962 Announced on the 10th (but only now got an ANN article) the Evangelion Store will be selling solar powered watches to celebrate the store's 20th anniversary; one in Unit 01's colors and the other with Nerv's logo. Not sure if it's on sale already or just pre-orders.

[]: Re: Evangelion solar powered watches announced             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Dec 15, 2024 7:36 pm Its always kinda funny when they don't do an equivalent for all the 5 Children (and possibly Misato). Sometimes you have silly arguments about the "meaning" of there not being a blue watch for Rei or there not being a pink one for Mari.

[]: Re: Evangelion solar powered watches announced             Quote Post by MoonRabbitMallow » Mon Dec 16, 2024 4:38 pm Oh they went with a general "Nerv" theme for the second one? At first I thought it was an edgier version of Asuka's color palette lmao. Looks cute! I actually really like the second one.
